title: Glick Luxury Medium Gift Bag, Happy Birthday Landscape Gift Bag - Medium, Navy for Him, 225mm, x 175mm x 100mm.
features: LUXURY GIFT BAGS: These are sturdy and will fit most types of multiples of smaller and medium-sized presents. This gift bag will make wrapping those smaller gifts much easier. With over 80 designs and sizes of gift bags to choose from, we have gift wrap for every occasion you need
UNIQUE & EXTRAVAGENT: This beautiful gift bag is perfect for him/her on their special day. It comes with ribbon handles, and a gift tag attached to write your own message on.
HIGH QUALITY: Printed on high quality 210GSM paper, a thicker but bendable material, perfect for carrying heavy gifts, or for keeping fragile gifts protected inside.

MEASUREMENTS: The dimensions of this gift bag are height - 175mm, width - 225mm and depth - 100mm. Perfect for those larger-sized gifts, and allows any gifts to be wrapped with ease. Printed on 190GSM Paper
description: From the manufacturer So Many Designs Bottle Bags Glick has a wide range of Bottle Gift Bags. There are bottle bags, birthday bags, thank you's, weddings and other celebration gift bags. Junior Bags The Juniors range is colourful and bags come in a selection of sizes and designs. You will be able to find the bag you want! No matter what the child likes. Landscape Bags We have a large range of landscape Gift Bags for those gifts that are slightly wider than usual. Gift Bags Our Gift Bags come in a range of sizes from Mini through to Shopper, including these Plant Bags.
